name: Uncle's Favorite Blueberry Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and sugar until smooth.
2. Add eggs one at a time, mixing after each addition until fully blended.
3. Sift together all dry ingredients: flour, baking powder, and salt.
4. Alternate adding the dry mixture with milk and vanilla, mixing until just combined.
5. Mash half of the blueberries to break up larger pieces; stir them into the batter.
6. Fold in the remaining whole blueberries.
7. Grease muffin tins or line with paper liners.
8. Pour batter into prepared tins, mounding it high.
9. Sprinkle sugar evenly over each muffin.
10. Bake at 375°F for 30 minutes. Makes 12 muffins.
